recent: be closely related to	与……密切相关。
Compared with passive input, active output leaves a deeper impression.	与被动输入相比，主动输出会留下更深的印象。
review mistakes in time	及时复盘错误。
play a crucial role in	在……中起关键作用。
规律复习才会让有用表达真正留在脑子里。	Regular review is what makes useful expressions stay in your mind.
Instead of waiting for motivation, we should rely on discipline.	与其等待动力，不如依靠自律。
Short but focused review can still produce meaningful progress.	短而专注的复习也能带来有意义的进步。
